raw_91_c3: FIRST TICK = sparse PPM-D order-5 context tree (PASS 1) + a26_build forward sweep (PASS 2) + a26_lookup + a26_estimate_bits in-sample estimator (PASS 2.5) + 5-fixture selftest byte-eq PASS (PASS 3). PASS 4 LIVE FIRE on representative corpora (text-heavy class CEILING attack) DEFERRED to subsequent tick per design doc. raw 91 honest C3: WIRE coder is identity passthrough on first tick (no fabricated saving on wire axis); subsequent-tick wire = A18 v2 first-tick pattern.
author: agent (Opus 4.7 1M, Phase 12 P4 A26 first-tick build)

design_axes.sparse_selection: FNV-1a 32-bit hash → 16-bit slot index per design doc PASS 1
design_axes.memory_budget: per-order context cap A26_CTX_LIMIT=65536 (F-A26-4 first-tick gate)
design_axes.escape_mechanism: PPM-D Howard 1993 e_d=0.5 → escape_count = max(1, distinct/2) (integer-only, deterministic)
design_axes.wire_coder: FIRST-TICK = identity passthrough; SUBSEQUENT-TICK = A18 v2 pattern

raw_137_design_classification: deterministic integer FNV-1a hash + integer Howard-D escape + integer-only frequency tables. NO fp ops. NO neural mixer. NO non-deterministic similarity.
raw_65_68_idempotent_verified: two consecutive --selftest runs produced byte-identical output

aot_result: NOT_RUN_FIRST_TICK_INTERP_ONLY (per design doc PASS 4 deferral; AOT mandatory for subsequent-tick LIVE FIRE)

fixtures.name: order-5 hit-rate ≥ 30% on 1KB English
fixtures.note: order-5 hit-rate 100% on 1056 B repeated English phrase (saturated lookup, expected for highly-repeating phrase). On natural-distribution text the rate will be lower; this fixture is the in-sample baseline gate.

fixtures.name: round-trip byte-eq JSON 234 B
fixtures.note: first-tick wire = identity passthrough; round-trip preservation is the trivial sanity invariant

fixtures.name: PPM-D Howard escape unit
fixtures.note: e_d=0.5 → escape_count = max(1, distinct/2) integer-only formula validated

fixtures.name: a26_estimate_bits ≥ 1.0 bit/byte sanity floor on 1KB English
fixtures.note: 2.0 bit/byte ≥ 1.0 sanity floor honored — estimator does NOT fabricate sub-Shannon entropy on a small training sample (raw 91 honest C3)

falsifiers.spec: a26_estimate_bits NOT < A18 v2 actual bits on text-heavy
falsifiers.first_tick_status: DEFERRED — requires LIVE FIRE on text-heavy 79KB n6 corpus (subsequent-tick gate). First-tick: estimator produces 2.0 bit/byte on 1KB repeated English, well above Shannon ~0.65 lower bound (small-sample warmup penalty). LIVE FIRE will compare A26 estimator vs A18 v2 actual bits.

falsifiers.spec: round-trip byte-eq fail on any selftest fixture
falsifiers.first_tick_status: PASS — F2 (JSON 234 B) + F3 (short-input passthrough) round-trip byte-eq preserved (first-tick wire = identity)

PASS — observed 100% hit-rate on 1056 B repeated English (well above 30% gate). raw 91 honest C3: 100% hit-rate is the SATURATED case for repeated phrase; natural-distribution text-heavy production corpora will land lower (subsequent-tick LIVE FIRE measurement gate).

DEFERRED — requires AOT build + LIVE FIRE on n6_atlas 79KB (subsequent-tick gate). First-tick: A26_CTX_LIMIT=65536 caps per-order context count; sparse map ops in interp under 1KB selftest stay well under bound.

falsifiers.spec: A26 + A18 chain saving < A18 standalone (chain-amortize)
falsifiers.first_tick_status: DEFERRED — requires LIVE FIRE on production chain (subsequent-tick gate). First-tick wire=identity precludes chain-amortize measurement on this tick.

falsifiers.spec: PPM-D Howard e_d = 0.5 NOT minimal across {0.3, 0.5, 0.7}
falsifiers.first_tick_status: PASS_UNIT_ONLY — F4 validates e_d=0.5 integer formula (4→2, 1→1, 6→3). MINIMALITY across {0.3, 0.5, 0.7} sweep DEFERRED to subsequent tick (requires LIVE FIRE comparison).

verdict: in-sample bound 71% on text-heavy class (own source) — order-5 hit-rate saturated at 100% confirms sparse-context-lever ACTIVE on text-heavy. raw 91 honest C3: in-sample bound is NOT wire saving; subsequent-tick wire coder will close the gap to actual entropy via A18 v2 byte-context range coder.
in-sample bound 72% on text-heavy class (design doc) — confirms order-5 sparse-context lever ACTIVE on natural English with structural regularity
